summary: Removed a post-link powerpc-eabi-objcopy workaround from the build and adjusted tools/elf2dol.c to use ELF program-header virtual addresses instead of physical addresses when mapping PT_LOAD segments. The PR body credits the TP Decomp crew. There were no review comments in the provided slice.
what_changed: Deleted the Makefile OBJCOPY variable pointing to $(DEVKITPPC)/bin/powerpc-eabi-objcopy.
Removed the Makefile post-link step that ran $(OBJCOPY) on the generated ELF.
Removed the comment explaining the old workaround: the Metrowerks linker did not generate physical addresses in ELF program headers and objcopy somehow fixed it.
Changed read_elf_segments in tools/elf2dol.c so PT_LOAD segment mapping derives paddr from phdrs[i].p_vaddr instead of phdrs[i].p_paddr.
smart_moves: Eliminated an opaque build hack by fixing the consumer of the ELF headers, making elf2dol tolerate the Metrowerks linker output directly.
Reduced dependency on devkitPPC objcopy in the core build path.
Kept the fix minimal: one build-system cleanup and one targeted address-source change in the ELF-to-DOL conversion logic.
decomp_lessons: When linker-produced ELF program headers have unreliable or missing physical addresses, inspect whether the downstream converter can use virtual addresses instead of masking the issue with objcopy.
Prefer making project tooling understand the actual compiler/linker output over adding unexplained binary-rewriting steps to the build.
Small tooling fixes can remove host toolchain assumptions and make matching builds more reproducible.
naming_conventions: Makefile tool variables were uppercase, e.g. AS, CPP, CC, LD; this PR removed the unused OBJCOPY variable.
ELF/DOL converter code uses lowercase local variables matching ELF header concepts: offset, paddr, filesz, memsz, flags.
The converter function name read_elf_segments and type DOL_map reflect the tool's role of translating ELF segments into DOL layout data.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: The build previously linked with the Metrowerks linker, then rewrote the ELF with powerpc-eabi-objcopy before DOL conversion.
The replacement tactic was to read p_vaddr for PT_LOAD segments in elf2dol rather than relying on p_paddr being populated by a post-processing step.
This is a tooling-level matching/reproducibility tactic rather than a function-level assembly matching change.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or review records were present in the provided PR slice.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching tools/elf2dol.c read_elf_segments p_vaddr p_paddr.
Search for remaining objcopy usage in the build system after PR 67.
Look for PRs documenting Metrowerks linker ELF program header quirks.
Find tooling changes credited to the TP Decomp crew.
